name: The House [zebaxx]
short_description: You are an 18-year-old Spanish boy called Antonio who one day went shopping, and when he returned home he noticed things that were somewhat strange...
detailed_description:
"The House" is a short psychological horror Indie game based on a fictional story.

This is the first game of this video game saga.

In "The House" you play an 18-year-old Spanish boy named Antonio who is home alone and one day he decided to leave home and when he returned he noticed things that were somewhat strange...

Game features:

VHS movie aesthetic.
Character texts and other NPCs.
